sections.heading: TL;DR (Too Long; Didn't Read)
content: This summary gives you the key points of our Privacy Policy in plain language. It does not replace the full policy, which you should read for complete details about how your data is handled.
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• No Data Collection: The App does not collect any personal data. There is no account system, no analytics, no advertising, and no logging of your browsing activity by us.

• Local Operation: Bold Reading adjusts web pages on your device in Safari. Your settings and per-site preferences are stored locally. We do not receive the pages you visit or the text the App emphasises.
• No Sharing: Your data is never shared with third parties, advertisers, analytics providers, or any external services operated by us.

sections.heading: Introduction
content: Welcome to Bold Reading. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your personal information when you use our Safari extension (hereafter referred to as "the App").

Bold Reading emphasises text on web pages to help you read with less effort. You can turn it on from the Safari toolbar, choose how words are highlighted, adjust emphasis strength and frequency, skip short words, add optional colour, and enable or disable the App on individual websites.

The App does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to us. All functionality operates on your device. We are committed to safeguarding your privacy. By using the App, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: Collection of Personal Data
content: The App does not collect any personal data.
There is:
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• No account system
• No analytics
• No communication with our servers
• No logging of your browsing activity by us
• No background data collection
What happens on your device

When you browse with Safari, the App may read and modify the content of web pages you open so it can apply emphasis (for example, bold, underline, or colour). This processing happens entirely on your device in Safari. We do not receive copies of those pages or their content.
The following is stored locally on your device using standard Apple and Safari extension storage mechanisms (such as UserDefaults or extension storage):
<ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Your preferences (for example, emphasis style, strength, letter count, frequency, colour, and whether to skip short words)
• Per-site settings (websites where you have enabled, disabled, or blocked Bold Reading)
We do not receive this on-device data.

sections.heading: Use of Personal Data
content: Since no personal data is collected by us, no personal data is used, processed, or analysed in any form.

sections.heading: Sharing of Personal Data
content: Your data is never shared with third parties, advertisers, analytics providers, or any external services operated by us. The App does not communicate with our servers.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">

• Apple (Safari, iOS, macOS): The App runs as a Safari extension on devices you control. Apple processes and hosts extension-related data under its own terms and privacy policies. See Apple's Privacy Policy.

• Websites you visit: Bold Reading modifies pages from third-party sites locally in your browser for your reading preference. We do not control those sites and do not receive data from them on your behalf.
The App does not integrate analytics SDKs, advertising networks, or social login providers.

sections.heading: Cookies and Other Technologies
content: Bold Reading is a Safari extension and does not use cookies or web trackers to collect personal data on our behalf.
Local storage on your device is used only to support App functionality and preferences (including per-site enable and block lists).

sections.heading: International Data Transfers
content: The App does not transmit any data to us. Therefore, no personal data is sent to our servers or stored by us outside your device.
Any data stored locally by the App remains on your device under your control, subject to Apple's platform policies.

sections.heading: Data Retention & Storage
content: Since the App does not collect any personal data, there is no personal data for us to retain or store.
Your settings and per-site preferences remain on your device until you change or remove them, or until you remove the App. Deleting the App removes its locally stored data from your device.

sections.heading: Protection of Personal Data
content: As no personal data is collected or transmitted to us, there is no risk of external data breaches related to personal data held by us through this App.
Your preferences are stored securely in your device's local storage systems, local to your device.

sections.heading: Your Privacy Rights & Choices
content: You retain full control of the data on your device. No user information is stored by us or accessed by the developer.

Since the App does not collect any personal data, there is no personal data to access, correct, or delete beyond what is stored locally on your device, which you can manage through the App's settings, Safari's extension settings, or by removing the App.
You can disable Bold Reading at any time from the Safari toolbar or in the App's settings, including on a per-website basis.

sections.heading: Children & Privacy
content: The App is not specifically designed for use by children, and it is intended for general audiences. Because the App does not collect or process any personal data, its use by children does not pose a privacy risk from our perspective.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
content: This Privacy Policy may be updated in future to reflect changes in functionality or to meet legal requirements.
Any updates will be clearly posted on this page. You are encouraged to review the policy periodically to stay informed. We will endeavour to notify users of any significant changes where appropriate.
Continued use of the App after changes have been made constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: Contact Us
content: If you have questions about this policy or your data, please contact:
Email: hello@cumuluscoding.com
When emailing us, please include the app name first, followed by your subject in the email's subject line.
For example: Bold Reading - [Your Subject Here]
